parsed_review.summary: CP00-749 is a clean descriptor-only P07→P08 scope-bridge pack (risk C, 150 units, RP24.P07.M06.S09–RP24.P08.M02.S20) that follows the established CP722–748 pattern. Identity, counts, and distributions reconcile exactly across binding (registry.js:468/3905), baseline, manifest, contract projection, and prompt: deliverables 53+25+39+5+12+9+7=150 and micro-titles 14+22+22+22+20+10+20+20=150. CP749 is correctly wired: case set chains from CP748 (service.js:114), descriptor built via shared createDescriptor (service.js:58), exported via index.js, and registered as the latest entry in the deterministic contract generator (scripts/validate-rp24-korean-legal-depth-contract.mjs:39). The shared validateDescriptor (validators.js:20) enforces descriptor-only/no-leak/authority boundaries, and model.test.js carries three CP749 cases covering coverage, a runtime-closed descriptor (runtime_opening_pack_id=CP00-750), and contract-projection-latest. command-evidence.json records all 22 commands (including every required validation command and git diff --check) at exit 0. No-write/no-real-data boundaries hold: all runtime/payload/permission-detail/audit-body flags are false, Hermes packets emit no runtime receipt (gate-only H24), and the Claude packet is read_only with Read/Grep/Glob only and the required invalid-review blockers. Authority boundary is intact: claude_is_final_approval=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false; the pack claims neither runtime nor enterprise trust. manifest/construction-inspection/adjudication correctly report production_ready=false / pending_review with empty valid AND invalid review-receipt lists and no pre-fabricated raw-output — the expected pre-review state that a passing receipt supports advancing. changed-file-scope correctly segregates active refs from unrelated dirty files with nothing omitted. Provenance: command/test outcomes are from the recorded command-evidence plus static source inspection, not independent re-execution (read-only, no-Bash review by design). No P0–P3 findings; PASS. Does not block pack closeout, and does not block this CP's closeout goal (the human/enterprise-trust approval boundary is external to this descriptor-only receipt).
